allow: PowerShell($mavenVersion = "3.9.9"; $url = "https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/$mavenVersion/binaries/apache-maven-$mavenVersion-bin.zip"; $dest = "C:\\tools\\maven-$mavenVersion.zip"; $installDir = "C:\\tools"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $installDir | Out-Null; Write-Host "Descargando Maven $mavenVersion..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $dest -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Extrayendo..."; Expand-Archive -Path $dest -DestinationPath $installDir -Force; Write-Host "Listo en $installDir\\apache-maven-$mavenVersion")
